changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.ext:documentation: Adding test users for login page feature development and testing. Password for all test users: 'Testing1!'
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO "user" (email, password, first_name, last_name, role, enabled, validated) VALUES ('admin@eventify.io', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$krfILmRkWyhqDGDpe/4OqOqrAwDMrJFYJeRvggYm7039Ezmcm3WWy', 'Admin', 'User', 'ADMIN', TRUE, TRUE), ('manager@eventify.io', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$krfILmRkWyhqDGDpe/4OqOqrAwDMrJFYJeRvggYm7039Ezmcm3WWy', 'Manager', 'User', 'USER', TRUE, TRUE), ('user@eventify.io', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$krfILmRkWyhqDGDpe/4OqOqrAwDMrJFYJeRvggYm7039Ezmcm3WWy', 'Test', 'User', 'USER', TRUE, TRUE);
